title: rubus × robertii-kelleri
intro: Rubus × robertii-kelleri, also known as the Robert's hybrid raspberry or Robert's raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining characteristics of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the American raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its high concentration of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × robertii-kelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Rubus × robertii-kelleri is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
